title: helichrysum scitulum
intro: Helichrysum scitulum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family. This plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum scitulum include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Helichrysum scitulum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, ease pain, and boost the immune system.
